Bash(cd /c/Users/ehart/repos/candy-snake && git add src/SnakeGame.jsx index.html && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add padding and responsive scaling for mobile screens

Wrap game UI in a max-width container with 16px gutters so
nothing touches screen edges. Board uses aspect-ratio to
scale down on narrow viewports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/ehart/repos/candy-snake && git add src/SnakeGame.jsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Smooth 60fps rendering with rAF interpolation and GPU compositing

- Replace setInterval with requestAnimationFrame game loop that
  ticks at game speed but renders at 60fps with position interpolation
- Switch snake/food from left/top to transform: translate3d\(\) for
  GPU-accelerated compositing \(skips layout recalculation\)
- Extract static checkerboard grid to React.memo component,
  eliminating 400 unnecessary DOM diffs per frame
- Add will-change: transform hints for compositor layer promotion
- Handle board wrap-around by snapping instead of interpolating

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/ehart/repos/candy-snake && git add src/SnakeGame.jsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix snake going off-screen on mobile via scaled board

The board CSS was responsive \(shrinks on small screens\) but all
game elements were positioned in full 440px coordinates, causing
content near edges to render outside the visible area.

Fix: keep the board internally at its fixed pixel size and use
CSS transform: scale\(\) to fit it into the responsive container.
A ResizeObserver tracks the wrapper size and computes the scale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push 2>&1)
